'''âv-r-w-j''' ('''kavarwejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:youthfulise|youthfulise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:youthfulise|youthfulise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-r-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| kavarwejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivarwejoko|thivarwejoko]] || [[word:jivarwejoko|jivarwejoko]] || [[word:shivarwejoko|shivarwejoko]] || [[word:kivarwejoko|kivarwejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvarwejoko|thuthuvarwejoko]] || [[word:jujuvarwejoko|jujuvarwejoko]] || [[word:shushuvarwejoko|shushuvarwejoko]] || [[word:kukuvarwejoko|kukuvarwejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovarwejoko|thovarwejoko]] || [[word:jovarwejoko|jovarwejoko]] || [[word:shovarwejoko|shovarwejoko]] || [[word:kovarwejoko|kovarwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvarwejoko|thĂŠvarwejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvarwejoko|jĂŠvarwejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvarwejoko|shĂŠvarwejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvarwejoko|kĂŠvarwejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavarwejoko|thathavarwejoko]] || [[word:jajavarwejoko|jajavarwejoko]] || [[word:shashavarwejoko|shashavarwejoko]] || [[word:kakavarwejoko|kakavarwejoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
